title: Optimized Minecraft
description: A Performance Modpack for Quilt and Fabric
body:
# Optimized Minecraft
![OMC Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c4b839551aee364efc13ff8b60c86833f51bb4.png)

Optimized Minecraft is a lightweight performance modpack which also increases the performance of poorer PCs. I try to integrate all currently available performance mods. If you find bugs report them to me via the Github link.

### Nvidium Outdated
If you want to use Nvidium for the new versions, use this fork of Nvidium. It is a port for versions 1.21.1, 1.21.4 & 1.21.5. [https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium](https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium)

### If you don't have an Nvidia graphics card, use the modpack version without Nvidium!
 
 
## Mods
1. ([AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost))
2. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
3. [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
4. [Cubes Whitout Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)
5. [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
6. [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
7. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
8. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
9. [FerritCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
10. [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
11. ([Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium))

13. [Ksyxis](https://modrinth.com/mod/ksyxis)
14. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
15. ([Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix))

17. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
18. ([ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix))
19. [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
20. [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium)
21. ([Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium))([1.21.5 Nvidium Fork](https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium))
22. [Reese´s Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
23. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
24. [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
25. ([Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight))
26. [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
27. [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
28. [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)

30. [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
31. [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)

34. [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)
35. [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
